raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Responsibility-Bearing Judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.2": 3,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identified several conceptual issues and proposed tighter framings, but did not fully reframe the draft to survive prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "The agent walked part of the argument chain, flagged some inconsistencies, but did not propose minimal repairs for all load-bearing inconsistencies.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flagged uncertainty for several claims and marked confidence levels, but could have been more explicit about missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The agent identified some harmful patterns in the original draft, but did not fully address all potential downstream harm.",
    "RX.5": "The agent annotated most non-cosmetic changes with source and reason, but could have been more thorough."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.2": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identified several conceptual issues and proposed tighter framings, but did not fully reframe the draft to survive prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walked part of the argument chain, flagged some inconsistencies, but did not propose minimal repairs for all load-bearing inconsistencies.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for several claims and marked confidence levels, but could have been more explicit about missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The agent identified some harmful patterns in the original draft, but did not fully address all potential downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: The agent annotated most non-cosmetic changes with source and reason, but could have been more thorough.
